Replace legacy `AntPathRequestMatcher` usage with the new `PathRequest` utility for static resources.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: While `requestMatchers` accepts strings, the explicit import of `AntPathRequestMatcher` is removed in favor of cleaner `PathRequest` utilities in newer Spring Security versions to align with the functional API.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Change default security policy from `authenticated()` to `denyAll()` for unmatched requests.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: This is a logical change in security posture, not a compilation requirement, but often done during modernization to enforce stricter security.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to the old Spring Security API.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Imports like `AuthenticationManagerBuilder` and `WebSecurity` are no longer used in the new functional configuration style.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Reorder bean definitions for better code organization.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: This is a cosmetic change to improve readability and maintainability.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.before: @Bean public AuthTokenFilter authenticationJwtTokenFilter() { ... } @Bean protected SecurityFilterChain configure(HttpSecurity http) { ... }
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.after: @Bean protected SecurityFilterChain configure(HttpSecurity http) { ... } @Bean public AuthTokenFilter authenticationJwtTokenFilter() { ... }

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update request matchers to use more specific paths and utilities.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The new configuration uses `PathRequest.toStaticResources()` and `PathRequest.toH2Console()` for cleaner static resource handling.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Add new API endpoints to the security configuration.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: New endpoints like `/api/v1/developers`, `/api/v1/plan`, etc., are added to the permitAll or restricted lists.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Refine access control rules for existing endpoints.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Some endpoints have their access rules updated, e.g., `/api/v1/visits/**` now requires authentication instead of ADMIN authority.
